SessionStart.command: bash -c 'PORT_FILE="$HOME/.claude-drive/port"; if [ ! -f "$PORT_FILE" ]; then echo "[claude-drive] Daemon is not running. Start it with: node out/cli.js start"; exit 0; fi; PORT=$(cat "$PORT_FILE"); curl -sf "http://localhost:$PORT/health" > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo "[claude-drive] Daemon port file exists but health check failed. Restart with: node out/cli.js start"'
